title: psylliostachys spicatus
intro: Psylliostachys spicatus, also known as Chinese club moss or psyllium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Psylliostachys spicatus include lowering cholesterol levels, regulating bowel movements, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Psylliostachys spicatus are often made into capsules, tablets, or powders, and can be consumed as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
